name: Silvercorp Metals Inc.
description: Silvercorp Metals Inc. is a Canadian-based mining company headquartered in Vancouver, with a long-standing operating track record. The company focuses on the acquisition, exploration, and development of precious metal properties, primarily producing silver, gold, lead, and zinc. With significant operations in China and a growing global portfolio, Silvercorp is committed to supplying essential metals for the expanding green energy sector. The company leverages its technical expertise and financial strength to operate profitable mines while generating sustainable economic, social, and environmental value for its stakeholders, trading on both the TSX and NYSE American exchanges.
